scripts.build: bun run icons:build && bun run --cwd apps/vadivam-internal build && bun run --cwd apps/figma-plugin build && bun run --cwd apps/docs build
scripts.dev: bun run icons:build && bun run --cwd apps/docs dev
scripts.docs:build: bun run icons:build && bun run --cwd apps/docs build
scripts.docs:dev: bun run icons:build && bun run --cwd apps/docs dev
scripts.test:vadivam: bun run icons:build && publint packages/vadivam && bun test --preload ./tests/setup/happydom.ts tests/vadivam.client.test.mjs && bun test tests/vadivam.test.mjs tests/vadivam-static.test.mjs
scripts.test:react:unit: bun run icons:build && bun test --preload ./tests/setup/happydom.ts tests/vadivam-react/*.client.test.mjs && bun test tests/vadivam-react/*.ssr.test.mjs tests/vadivam-react/exports.test.mjs
scripts.test:vadivam-react: bun run icons:build && publint packages/vadivam-react && bun run test:react:unit
scripts.test:react-native:unit: bun run icons:build && bun test --preload ./tests/setup/happydom.ts tests/vadivam-react-native/*.client.test.mjs && bun test tests/vadivam-react-native/exports.test.mjs
scripts.test:vadivam-react-native: bun run icons:build && publint packages/vadivam-react-native && bun run test:react-native:unit
scripts.test:seo: bun run docs:build && bun test tests/seo.test.mjs tests/release-notes.test.mjs
scripts.packages:check: bun run test:vadivam && bun run test:vadivam-react && bun run test:vadivam-react-native && bun run test:frameworks:unit && bun run packages:validate
scripts.test: bun run icons:test && bun run test:vadivam-internal && bun run test:figma-plugin && bun run packages:check && bun run --cwd apps/docs check && bun run --cwd apps/docs validate && bun run test:seo && bun run test:integration
